steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined sentence shifts from praising Jones as a writer to explaining why featuring Blackfeet characters matters — specifically that it ensures Indigenous people have a place in the horror genre. The question asks what function this sentence serves in the paragraph.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — predicts future author behavior: the sentence describes an existing cultural impact, not what Jones will do next. ✗
  • Choice B — challenges an autobiographical claim: the passage makes no autobiographical claim to challenge. ✗
  • Choice C — highlights the cultural significance of the representation: the sentence explains that the novel's portrayal of Indigenous people opened representational space in the genre — a statement of cultural importance. ✓
  • Choice D — poses a question: the sentence is a statement, not a question, and the passage raises no such inquiry. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
